description:
In the BTCPay Server web interface (Nakamoto Electronics store), create a new invoice with the following details:

- Amount: 274.50 USD
- Order Id: ORD-2024-1861
- Item Description: "Teensy 4.1 + Audio Shield Bundle with I2S DAC"
- Buyer Email: j.martinez@audiolabs.co

The BTCPay Server is open in Firefox at http://localhost/. You are logged in as the store administrator. Navigate to the Invoices section, click 'Create Invoice', fill in the amount and metadata fields, and save the invoice.
